title: Architectus strikes.json
description: Per-project three-strike state for the Architectus plugin. Lives at .claude/architectus/strikes.json inside each project.

issues.description: Map of issue-slug to strike record. Slug format: <git-branch>-<6-char-hash-of-first-60-prompt-chars>.

strikes.description: Number of failures for this issue since it was last cleared.

first_seen.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the first recorded failure.

last_seen.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent failure.

status.description: active = this issue is still being fought; cleared = resolved. Heartbeat only surfaces active issues.
